signals.summary: Palantir CEO Alex Karp says AI will drive the most important political decisions in the U.S. and shouldn't be decided by party lines.

signals.title: Quantum Space to go public in SPAC deal
signals.summary:
Quantum Space, a company led by a former NASA administrator developing highly maneuverable spacecraft for national security missions, will go public by merging with a special purpose acquisition company. 
 The post  Quantum Space to go public in SPAC deal  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Pentagon reveals preferred munitions for one-way attack drones
signals.summary: The list includes Northrop Grumman and several startups competing to supply low-cost payloads compatible with any drone design.

signals.title: Spire to pursue space-based missile warning in partnership with German defense firm
signals.summary:
Diehl Defence will explore using Spire’s constellation for detection of ballistic and hypersonic missile threats  
 The post  Spire to pursue space-based missile warning in partnership with German defense firm  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump keeps saying an Iran deal is close. Markets keep believing it
signals.summary: Analysts still assume that, despite the continued conflict, a deal will eventually be reached that ends the war and reopens the Strait of Hormuz.

signals.title: ‘They got very lucky,’ Trump says of downed Apache helicopter’s crew
signals.summary: After a U.S. Army Apache helicopter was downed by an Iranian drone, President Donald Trump said the rescued aviators “got very lucky.”

signals.title: NASA names crew for Artemis 3 mission to test lunar landers
signals.summary:
NASA has named the astronauts who will fly the next Artemis mission, a test flight in low Earth orbit where Orion will attempt to dock with two lunar lander prototypes. 
 The post  NASA names crew for Artemis 3 mission to test lunar landers  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: New Glenn forced an explosive rewrite for NASA’s plans to build a moon base
signals.summary:
NASA unveiled plans in March to develop a lunar base as part of its “Ignition” event that outlined the agency’s new direction in human spaceflight. The plans, though, were rather […] 
 The post  New Glenn forced an explosive rewrite for NASA’s plans to build a moon base  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump pledges more Iran strikes, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
signals.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.

signals.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
signals.summary: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said, "We've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."

signals.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says U.S. will attack Iran 'very hard'
signals.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

signals.title: Trump says U.S. secretly moved more than 100 million barrels of oil through Strait of Hormuz
signals.summary: Trump's comments come after Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Tuesday that oil exports through Hormuz are "rising very meaningfully."

signals.title: Trump signs $70 billion immigration funding bill after months of delay
signals.summary: The $70 billion package will fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of President Donald Trump's term.

signals.title: Company that bet big on Trump-backed crypto says its fortunes have improved
signals.summary: AI Financial Corp. says it has mitigated some of the concerns that prompted it to say earlier that it may not be able to stay in business.

signals.title: US Navy stands up naval support activity in Western Australia
signals.summary: As part of the AUKUS security pact, NSA Stirling will provide support for personnel assigned to Submarine Rotational Force-West.

signals.title: Bisignano says Social Security Administration's phone helpline wait times have reached a record low
signals.summary: Long waits when calling the Social Security Administration's 800 number have been a legacy issue. Commissioner Frank Bisignano said he's changing that.

signals.title: Axiom and Prada advance design of spacesuit
signals.summary:
Axiom Space unveiled the design of another element of the lunar spacesuit it is developing for NASA in partnership with luxury designer Prada. 
 The post  Axiom and Prada advance design of spacesuit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US approves Kuwait request to buy nearly $2 billion of counter-drone platforms
signals.summary: Following recent Iranian strikes on Kuwait, the U.S. approved a potential foreign military sale of counter-UAS platforms made by Anduril.

signals.title: New York hits 5.6 GW hourly solar generation record
signals.summary: At the same time, the state’s electric system is “operating with the narrowest reliability margins in recent years,” said a report from the New York Independent System Operator.

signals.title: Companies are failing to keep up with AI’s sprawl, creating entry points for hackers
signals.summary: Three-quarters of organizations say they aren’t fully overseeing the activities of user accounts belonging to agents and other AI tools.

signals.title: FERC approves PJM fast-track review for ‘shovel-ready’ power projects
signals.summary: PJM will consider up to 10 interconnection requests annually over two years for resources of at least 250 MW that can come online in three years.

signals.title: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal
signals.summary: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.

signals.title: Qatari-donated Air Force One now sports red, white and blue paint job
signals.summary: The interim Air Force One VC-25B Bridge aircraft is undergoing its final modifications ahead of a summer rollout.

signals.title: USDA's Rollins called screwworm a 'little pest' amid U.S. spread. Last year, she called it 'terrifying'
signals.summary: The U.S. agriculture secretary is downplaying the threat posed by the spreading screwworm now compared with her more dire remarks last year.

signals.title: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
signals.summary: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.

signals.title: World Cup travel boost hasn't materialized for U.S. businesses — yet
signals.summary: The expected travel boom from the World Cup is looking like it will be a city-by-city, match-by-match test of pricing power.

signals.title: Starbucks stock is a bright spot in Wednesday's bleak market. Here's why
signals.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

signals.title: Amazon trucking expansion sparks freight stock sell-off
signals.summary: Amazon has been spinning out more of its in-house logistics offerings for others to access, posing a growing threat to industry incumbents.

signals.title: Bill Gates tells House panel 'I should have never met' with Jeffrey Epstein
signals.summary: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel.

signals.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
signals.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz.

signals.title: Supreme Court sends furnace case back to appeals court
signals.summary: The top court agreed with the Trump administration that Biden-era rules effectively eliminating non-condensing gas furnaces and water heaters from the market are based on an incomplete legal review.

signals.title: DOE reinstates $57M American Battery grant
signals.summary: American Battery Technology Co. won its appeal after the agency canceled the grant last year. It will continue plans to build a $115 million commercial-scale lithium refinery alongside its lithium-ion battery recycling efforts.

signals.title: Orbital raises $5 million to join orbital data center race

signals.title: The US usually sells weapons to Taiwan – with drones, expect the reverse

signals.summary: When OpenAI and Anthropic make their IPO prospectuses available to the public, investors are going to have to learn about a whole new economy.

signals.title: Volatility surge has trader eyeing one 'stable' stock
signals.summary: Mike Khouw is looking for a stable, cash-generating business where he can sell volatility instead of buying drama.

signals.title: As gold's tumble continues, traders bet the pain may last for two more years
signals.summary: Selling in the precious metal just keeps getting worse, with the GLD ETF now down 25% from its intraday record in February.

signals.title: Sen. Warren calls on SEC to delay SpaceX IPO, flagging concerns about valuation and governance
signals.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.

signals.summary: Inflation jumped to a three-year high in May as the Iran war continued to fuel higher energy prices.

signals.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.

signals.summary: Over 55 GW of generation has cleared PJM’s interconnection queue process and 220 GW just entered its latest review cycle, writes Glen Thomas, president of the PJM Power Providers Group.

signals.title: How load flexibility buys time for America’s data center boom
signals.summary: In markets where supply and demand are out of balance, grid connection increasingly comes with a choice: either bring the needed power yourself, or bring flexibility, write experts at ICF.

signals.title: UK startup NewOrbit raises $18.5 million in Series A round
signals.summary:
SAN FRANCISCO – NewOrbit Space, a UK startup developing satellites for very low Earth orbit (VLEO), has raised $18.5 million in a Series A investment round. With the funding, announced […] 
 The post  UK startup NewOrbit raises $18.5 million in Series A round  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet strikes, disables oil tanker in Gulf of Oman
signals.summary: An F/A-18 Super Hornet assigned to the aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln fired a precision munition into the vessel's engineering and steering spaces.

signals.title: Germany and France drop joint fighter jet project
signals.summary: Failure to reach an agreement underscores the struggles Europe has faced in rebuilding its military capacity after decades of underinvestment.

signals.title: US must learn lessons from Ukraine, innovate faster and cheaper: Anduril president
signals.summary: Anduril President Christian Brose discussed the need to develop cheaper weapons systems at scale to avoid quick depletion of exquisite munitions.

signals.title: Polish-Ukrainian startup develops radar to track elusive, low-flying drones
signals.summary: The technology aims to find small, low-flying drones, including those connected to operators via long, fiber-optic command wires.

signals.title: French jet on NATO mission shoots down drone in Latvian airspace
signals.summary: Military drones straying into the airspace of Russia’s neighbors have stoked concerns that Russia’s war in Ukraine is spilling over NATO’s borders.

signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.
